title: EWSR1-FLI1 + EWSR1-ETS variant cards (EWSR1-ERG/ETV1/ETV4/FEV), cited + graded
context: The defining-fusion cards cover EWSR1-FLI1 and the EWSR1-ETS variants (EWSR1-ERG/ETV1/ETV4/FEV) - the core diagnostic biomarkers of Ewing Sarcoma. Each assertion must be cited, provenance-backed, and evidence-graded, and ships only after domain-reviewer sign-off. This is a MEDIUM risk-tier research-reference card (research reference - not clinical guidance), gated on a TO-BE-SECURED domain reviewer. Binding cancer guardrails apply: only open-access / aggregate / de-identified sources (controlled-access - dbGaP, EGA, individual-level biobanks - and any identifiable patient data are out of scope); per-source license verified before reuse (COSMIC/OncoKB cite-only, CIViC CC0, DepMap CC-BY, ClinVar public domain, PMC-OA per-article); no-source-no-claim provenance on every assertion. No partner/reviewer/steward is yet secured, so this task carries requestor 'TO BE SECURED' and verifiedNeed false.
objective: Draft the EWSR1-FLI1 and EWSR1-ETS variant fusion cards (EWSR1-ERG/ETV1/ETV4/FEV) with every assertion cited, provenance-backed, evidence-graded, normalized, carrying the research-reference frame, and version-scoped domain-reviewer sign-off recorded before ship.
acceptanceCriteria: Every assertion cited + provenance-backed (no-source-no-claim) and assigned an evidence level (framework + version); diagnostic vs. prognostic associations distinguished with populationContext and an uncertaintyNote
Genes/fusions normalized (HGNC/SO/HGVS); restricted-source facts cited, not copied; carries the 'research reference - not clinical guidance' frame
Domain-reviewer sign-off recorded (version-scoped) before ship (reviewer TO BE SECURED)
